data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce response time and improve decision-making efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu layout with categorized options.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs large, easily clickable buttons to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Focuses on button and link sizes proportional to their importance.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations by maintaining consistency with commonly used interface patterns.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes standard navigation bars and action flows.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Chunks information to help users remember data more efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Breaks content into visually distinct sections with a clear hierarchy.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Ensures aesthetically pleasing design to improve perceived ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Clean, minimalistic design with moderated color palette.
